input_records.notes: Requested demo after webinar. Budget confirmed. Team asked for a tailored walkthrough next week.
Champion left the company. Competitor mentioned in last call. Buyer asked who else can approve the project.
Good discovery with clear pain, but no response since follow-up. Internal notes mention procurement may slow things down.
Budget confirmed and strong executive support. Buyer wants security review completed before commercial discussion.
No response after initial outreach. Contact opened the first note but has not replied.
Competitor mentioned, procurement asks for revised pricing, and legal review is still open.
Budget confirmed. Requested demo recap for CFO. No seller follow-up logged after the pricing review.

Positive champion feedback. ROI review is already booked for next week, and no major blockers are surfaced.
